title: LS2 FF396 Gloss White

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF396 utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to absorb high-impact energy while maintaining structural integrity during rotational forces. The shell construction employs a carbon fiber composite overmolded on an ABS core, significantly reducing overall mass without compromising the rigidity required for crash protection. This material combination allows for a lighter helmet that reduces neck fatigue during long rides while adhering to the latest ECE 22.06 safety standards regarding impact attenuation and penetration resistance.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of style and performance with the LS2 FF396 in a striking gloss white finish. Designed for the modern rider who demands both aerodynamic efficiency and superior comfort, this full-face helmet features an aggressive yet refined aesthetic that turns heads on the track or the street. The sleek design minimizes wind resistance while maximizing airflow through strategically placed vents.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF396 Gloss White full-face motorcycle helmet. Lightweight carbon fiber shell, ECE 22.06 certified, and superior ventilation for ultimate riding comfort and safety.
